TRAVERTINE NUEVO.description:
Introducing Travertine Nuevo by Goton: A Timeless Revival

For over a decade, Goton's original Travertine collection has been a go-to choice, bringing timeless style to countless homes.

Now, we are thrilled to introduce Travertine Nuevo - a modern refresh that honors the collection you've come to love.

Travertine Nuevo is more than just a new line; it's a respectful tribute to our roots and an exciting leap forward.

WHITEAUSE.description:
The look and feel of pure white marble, Whitehause features a thin layer of micro crystalline glass fused to a porcelain body.

 

Package Information

 

  SIZE

    PCS/BOX        SF/BOX    
24 X 48          2      15.49

 

Note

Due to the nature of micro-glass products, it may be prone to light scratches which may be enhanced with the high polish. This is not a defect of the tile and will vary with each individual installation.

 

Grout joint recommendation: 3/16"
